title: Team type catalogue
description: Sport-agnostic classification for teams. Each `team_type` value is a broad category chosen by the tenant's business shape. Not a hard constraint — the observer accepts any of the enum values on any tenant. The catalogue exists to inform tenant onboarding + SDUI form defaults.

types.description: Competitive sports team. Roster centred on athletes; coach + assistant_coach + team_manager staff roles. Common in academies, clubs, federations.
Recurring instructional session for adults. Roster centred on users; coach + assistant_coach roles. Common in gyms, sports centres, fitness studios.
Academic or seasonal group. Common in schools + academies that ship an academic curriculum alongside sports.
General-purpose grouping. Use when nothing more specific fits. Catch-all category.
Informal or recurring social group. Not competitively rostered. Common in adult community sports + informal training bands.
Fallback when the tenant's shape doesn't fit any of the above.

notes: The `team_type` value is used for filtering + defaults + display. It is NOT a hard constraint — the observer accepts any enum value on any tenant.

New business types shipping in future waves may prefer to extend this catalogue rather than reuse a mismatched value. Extension = adding an enum value on the TeamType cast + a row here + a i18n label.
The `typical_*` fields inform SDUI form defaults on the create-team wizard — they're not enforced.
